query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET 
  description = TRIM(SUBSTRING(name, LOCATE(', ', name) + 2)),
  name = TRIM(SUBSTRING(name, 1, LOCATE(', ', name) - 1))
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND (description IS NULL OR description = '')
  AND name LIKE '%, %'
  AND LENGTH(name) > 60
  AND name REGEXP ', (Restaurante|Gastronomia|Almoço|Chopp|Massas|Espetinhos|Feijoada|Carne|Feijão|Bolos|Pudins|Mousse|Doces|Pizza|Hamburgueria|Delivery|Risoto|Vinho)';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute
